blocks.content: Property manager confirmed. The listing link was emailed to Calloway from an address that traces to a secondary account. Working on whose.
Tomorrow morning if the provider cooperates. Evening if they don't.
The account will trace back to someone in that house. Prepare for that.
He put the phone face-down. Looked at the ceiling.
He thought about what Mara had said. *You've never cared about consequences before.*
That wasn't entirely true. He cared about consequences. He just didn't let them change what he saw.

What he saw right now was a group of people who had been friends for over two decades. One of them was a killer. Three more were going to have their understanding of the world fundamentally altered when they found out who. And one of them — Wren, quiet precise Wren — was already closer to the truth than she knew.
Don't let her get there alone. If she figures it out before Davenport has what he needs, she becomes a problem for the wrong person.
